ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the patient (M/F) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the patient */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the patient */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the patient */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the patient */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the patient */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the patient in centimeters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the patient in kilograms */,
  "smoking_status" TEXT /* Smoking status of the patient (e.g., Never, Former, Current) */,
  "alcohol_consumption" TEXT /* Alcohol consumption status of the patient (e.g., Never, Occasional, Regular) */,
  "family_history" TEXT /* Family history of heart disease (e.g., Yes, No) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medical_tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medical test */,
  "test_name" TEXT /* Name of the medical test (e.g., ECG, Blood Pressure) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the medical test */,
  "test_cost" REAL /* Cost of the medical test */,
  "test_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the medical test in minutes */,
  "test_frequency" TEXT /* Recommended frequency of the test (e.g., Annually, Bi-annually) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test result */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient who took the test */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the medical test taken */,
  "result_value" TEXT /* Result value of the test */,
  "result_date" TEXT /* Date the test was taken */,
  "test_location" TEXT /* Location where the test was conducted */,
  "test_conducted_by" INTEGER /* ID of the healthcare provider who conducted the test */,
  "test_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the test results */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES medical_tests ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "diagnoses" (
  "diagnosis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each diagnosis */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient diagnosed */,
  "diagnosis_date" TEXT /* Date the diagnosis was made */,
  "diagnosis" TEXT /* Diagnosis made (e.g., Heart Disease, Normal) */,
  "diagnosed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the healthcare provider who made the diagnosis */,
  "diagnosis_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the diagnosis */,
  "treatment_plan" TEXT /* Initial treatment plan recommended */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("diagnosis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diagnoses_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chest_pain_types" (
  "pain_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chest pain type */,
  "pain_type" TEXT /* Type of chest pain (e.g., ATA, NAP, ASY) */,
  "pain_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the chest pain type */,
  "pain_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the chest pain (e.g., Mild, Moderate, Severe) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pain_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resting_ecg" (
  "ecg_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ECG result */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient who took the ECG */,
  "ecg_result" TEXT /* Result of the ECG (e.g., Normal, ST) */,
  "ecg_conducted_by" INTEGER /* ID of the healthcare provider who conducted the ECG */,
  "ecg_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the ECG results */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ecg_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resting_ecg_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exercise_angina" (
  "angina_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each angina instance */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient who experienced angina */,
  "angina" TEXT /* Angina experienced (e.g., Y, N) */,
  "angina_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the angina episode in minutes */,
  "angina_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of angina episodes (e.g., Daily, Weekly, Monthly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("angina_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exercise_angina_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "st_slope" (
  "slope_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ST slope result */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient who took the ST slope test */,
  "slope" TEXT /* Result of the ST slope test (e.g., Up, Flat) */,
  "slope_conducted_by" INTEGER /* ID of the healthcare provider who conducted the ST slope test */,
  "slope_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the ST slope results */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("slope_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_st_slope_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "oldpeak" (
  "oldpeak_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each old peak value */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient with the old peak value */,
  "oldpeak_value" REAL /* Old peak value */,
  "oldpeak_conducted_by" INTEGER /* ID of the healthcare provider who conducted the old peak test */,
  "oldpeak_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the old peak results */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("oldpeak_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_oldpeak_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "heart_disease" (
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each heart disease diagnosis */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient diagnosed with heart disease */,
  "disease" INTEGER /* Heart disease diagnosis result (0/1) */,
  "disease_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the heart disease (e.g., Mild, Moderate, Severe) */,
  "disease_risk_factors" TEXT /* Risk factors contributing to the heart disease */,
  "disease_treatment_status" TEXT /* Current status of the treatment (e.g., Ongoing, Completed, Not Started) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disease_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_heart_disease_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "max_hr" (
  "maxhr_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maximum heart rate value */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient with the maximum heart rate value */,
  "max_hr_value" INTEGER /* Maximum heart rate value */,
  "max_hr_conducted_by" INTEGER /* ID of the healthcare provider who conducted the maximum heart rate test */,
  "max_hr_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the maximum heart rate results */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maxhr_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_max_hr_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)
